title: M7 validation matrix and readiness decision
summary: Consolidate all verified M7 evidence into a readiness decision matrix for Early Access preparation, public playtest preparation, Web demo and Windows controlled external test.
acceptance: Consolidates all M7 evidence into a readiness decision matrix
Records Early Access readiness, public playtest readiness, Web demo readiness and Windows controlled external test readiness separately
Runs M0-M6 regression gates required by M7 and records owner-gated residual decisions
Does not approve public release, EA launch, store submission, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services or final public save compatibility by itself
Blocks M7 closeout if any upstream M7 task is not done, independently reviewed and integrated

history.details: Created by WM-0098 M7 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Produce the M7 evidence matrix and readiness decision without launching or approving owner-gated public actions.
forbiddenPaths: tools/** unless only validation artifact routing is adjusted with review
public release upload store submission signing installer or updater
telemetry accounts paid services crash upload or public feedback service
final privacy legal store or public save compatibility claims
M8 task creation, promotion, claim, implementation or review
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: readiness matrix can be mistaken for launch approval; separate readiness from owner-gated public actions.
Risk: upstream task state can be stale; verify taskctl status and every M7 review before deciding.
File ownership is limited to readiness matrix, project-state marker and roadmap status notes.
ownerGate: Block if any M7 upstream task is not done, verified and integrated
Block on public release, EA launch, store submission, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services or final public save promises
Block if M0-M6 regression gates or benchmark thresholds fail
m0M6RegressionCoverage: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, quality, ci:local, m5-invariants, isolated bench and M5 100000-tick headless must pass
Preserve M5 final hashes 0xfba70a5c / 0x9ba83cb7 unless reviewed migration exists
Preserve M6 Web demo-only and Windows controlled-external-test verdicts unless owner-approved reviewed evidence changes them
benchmarkImpact: No benchmark baseline change expected. Use isolated artifact root for bench and apply 10 percent warning / 20 percent blocking thresholds.
reviewRouting: project-director completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies every upstream M7 task is done/verified/integrated and readiness language does not approve owner-gated launch actions.
rollbackModel: Revert WM-0109 readiness matrix, roadmap/project-state markers and report; keep upstream verified M7 task artifacts intact.

sparkEligibility.reason: Milestone readiness decision and regression consolidation require project-director ownership and independent review.
